title: Better Crossbows
description: Add Copper, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite Crossbows! With new features!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BETTER_CROSSBOWS/MP_BETTER_CROSSBOWS_Header.webp) This mod adds 4 new crossbows! From the sturdy copper crossbow to the powerful netherite one, each offers unique advantages and combat styles to suit your playstyle. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. ![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BETTER_CROSSBOWS/MP_BETTER_CROSSBOWS_Description.webp) Better Crossbows adds four new types of crossbows: copper, gold, diamond, and netherite. Each has its own characteristics. The copper one is simple but reliable, perfect if you haven’t found iron yet. The gold crossbow stands out for its fast reload speed, ideal for players who prefer agility, though it sacrifices some power and durability. If you’re looking for something stronger, the diamond crossbow offers increased damage, faster reloading, and much greater durability. And once you’ve advanced further in your world, the netherite crossbow becomes the ultimate upgrade, improving every aspect. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BETTER_CROSSBOWS/MP_BETTER_CROSSBOWS_Faq.webp) ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ### Can I record a video of this mod and show it on my channel? Sure, you are free to play this mod or any of our modpacks on your channel and make a video about it, in fact, we would be very grateful for it! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BETTER_CROSSBOWS/MP_BETTER_CROSSBOWS_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7jh4pFKK/images/44267227ef7de0bc260359820108c9eceb8e92b5.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7jh4pFKK/images/f9f35fd061c0b49c180bcce51ff8264983f5d43b.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7jh4pFKK/images/baa7ac5e4ecdf9a92a125c0054162c6a29b32446.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
